title: ecc::ecdh peer key format (DER SPKI) not obvious from signature or docs
description: ecdh() takes peer_public_der: &[u8] with doc 'peer DER SubjectPublicKeyInfo'. Users who try raw 65-byte uncompressed points or 33-byte compressed points will get an opaque C error from wc_EccPublicKeyDecode. The natural assumption for an ECDH API is raw point format. The parameter name 'peer_public_der' is good but the doc should say explicitly: 'must be the 91-byte DER SubjectPublicKeyInfo as returned by public_key_der(), not a raw EC point'. Also: the doc on public_key_der() should say it produces the format expected by ecdh().
